title: Total tax offsets 2024
description: Complete this question to work out the total tax offsets in your tax return.
keywords: Individual tax return instructions, supplement, tax offsets, total tax offsets, supplement tax offsets, tax return 2024, instructions, paper form, paper return, paper lodgement

content_blocks.text: To complete this question, follow the steps below.
Add up all the tax offset amounts you claimed at questions T2 and T in your tax return. (We work out the amounts at question T1 automatically.)
If you did not claim any tax offsets in the Tax return for individuals (supplementary section) 2024, you will not have an amount at question T .
Write the total amount at TOTAL TAX OFFSETS – label U in your tax return.

items: Go to question M1 Medicare levy reduction or exemption 2024 .
Return to main menu Individual tax return instructions 2024 .
Go back to Tax offsets in your supplementary tax return 2024 .

content_text:
## Completing your tax return
To complete this question, follow the steps below.
### Step 1
Add up all the tax offset amounts you claimed at questions T2 and T in your tax return. (We work out the amounts at question T1 automatically.)
If you did not claim any tax offsets in the Tax return for individuals (supplementary section) 2024, you will not have an amount at question T .
### Step 2
Write the total amount at TOTAL TAX OFFSETS – label U in your tax return.
## Where to go next
- Go to question M1 Medicare levy reduction or exemption 2024 .
- Return to main menu Individual tax return instructions 2024 .
- Go back to Tax offsets in your supplementary tax return 2024 .
